caption: A man is seated in a podcast studio, wearing a navy blue baseball cap, a black t-shirt that says "CHECK IT!", and large grey over-ear headphones. He wears a gold chain around his neck and a watch on his left wrist. He is positioned in front of a microphone and speaks while looking toward someone off-screen to his right. The background consists of a white wall featuring repeating logos for "HUSTLE" accompanied by stars, as well as a larger "BOSS TALK 101" logo. On-screen graphics include a "BOSS TALK 101" logo on the right and a "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" logo on the left. Across the frames, the man remains in a similar position, slightly shifting his head and facial expression as he continues speaking, while the camera and background remain static.
